items.caption: A caricature drawing showing a man shouting "NICK: 'YOU'D BETTER GO OVER IT!'" while pointing at a storyboard. Another man labeled "DAVE" is seen in the background. A handwritten note with an arrow points to the text, reading "meaning the story board".
items.md: ![A caricature drawing showing a man shouting "NICK: 'YOU'D BETTER GO OVER IT!'" while pointing at a storyboard. Another man labeled "DAVE" is seen in the background. A handwritten note with an arrow points to the text, reading "meaning the story board".](CBatAotCB-020_page_1_image_1_v2.jpg)
The "Dave" in this drawing is David Hand, who supervised the Disney short cartoons in the late thirties.
items.value: The "Dave" in this drawing is David Hand, who supervised the Disney short cartoons in the late thirties.

items.caption: A caricature drawing of three men with duck-like bodies under a "WELCOME" sign. The men are labeled "REEVES", "COUCH", and "BARKS". Reeves holds a knife, Couch holds an axe, and Barks holds a pair of binoculars.
